title: scrophularia umbrosa subsp. neesii
intro: Scrophularia umbrosa subsp. neesii, also known as the woodland figwort or Nees' figwort, is a plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia umbrosa subsp. neesii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
